title: Wrong Tube Type Collected
content: The ordered test requires a specific anticoagulant or additive (e.g. EDTA for hematology, sodium citrate for coagulation, SST for chemistry) and the received tube type does not match. Disposition: retest_required in nearly all cases, since analyte stability and anticoagulant interactions cannot be corrected after the fact. Exception: if the wrong tube is a superset-compatible type (e.g. lithium heparin substituted for sodium heparin on a basic metabolic panel) and the test menu confirms compatibility, accept_with_notation. Otherwise reject the specimen and request recollection in the correct tube.
